descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes win Centennial Cup championship with 5-2 victory over Humboldt Broncos.
descriptionLong: Jason Phillips scored three goals as the Richmond Sockeyes defeated the Humboldt Broncos 5-2 to win the Centennial Cup Tier Two junior-A hockey championship in Humboldt, Saskatchewan on May 10, 1987. Goaltender Frank Romeo earned MVP honours in the four-team roundrobin series, stopping 46 shots. Paul Rutherford and Dave Tomlinson also scored for Richmond in the winning effort.
